briefing.title: The Juice Shop
briefing.subtitle: Where every stranger is a suspect
briefing.briefingText: Your cover identity: Hamza Ali Mazari. Make contact with handler Mohammed Aalam.
objectives: Navigate to Mohammed Aalam's juice shop
Maintain cover - do not raise suspicion
Learn the layout of Lyari's streets

lines.speaker: sanyal
lines.text: Jaskirat... from this moment, you are Hamza Ali Mazari. A Baloch from Quetta. You work as a delivery boy. You know nothing about India.

lines.speaker: sanyal
lines.text: Your handler is Mohammed Aalam. He runs a juice shop in the heart of Lyari. Find him. He will give you your first assignment.

lines.speaker: jaskirat
lines.text: And if my cover is blown?

lines.speaker: sanyal
lines.text: Then you never existed. There will be no rescue. No acknowledgment. Operation Dhurandhar lives and dies with you.

lines.speaker: narrator
lines.text: You step into the narrow streets of Lyari. The air is thick with dust, spices, and the distant sound of gunfire. Welcome to Karachi.

lines.speaker: aalam
lines.text: Ah, you must be the new delivery boy! Come, come. Sit. Have some juice. The mango is fresh today.

lines.speaker: hamza
lines.text: Mohammed bhai? I was told you could help me find work.

lines.speaker: aalam
lines.text: Work? In Lyari, work finds you. But first... tell me. Do you know who Rehman Dakait is?

lines.speaker: aalam
lines.text: Stories don't do him justice. He controls every street, every shop, every life in this district. If you want to survive here, you need his blessing.

lines.speaker: aalam
lines.text: Good. For now, take this package to the market. Prove you can follow orders, and doors will open.
